prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-GRGTGPG14I-DUALRIFF-14-GRN-3 Product Type: OUTDOOR_LIVING Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 10 Inch Triple Riffle Gold Pan Gold Prospecting Equipment, Green Description: Trap gold while gold panning with the ASR Outdoor Triple Riffle Gold Pan for Gold Prospecting.

This lightweight but super tough pan is a top quality gold getter, and will hold up to years of gold prospecting.

Featuring three riffle types cut into the sidewalls and bottom of the pan helping to catch more fine gold and taking the hard work out of the panning process, these deep and shallow riffles make it possible to run more gold paydirt and gold rich concentrate effectively through the prospecting gold pan.

This high impact plastic gold pan is lightweight, easy to use and the most efficient gold panning tool to use today over traditional steel gold pans. It is molded from durable ABS plastic that is UV resistant, rust proof and floats.

Use the deep riffles to rough out the raw material, finishing with the shallow riffles to make short work of your final heavy gold concentrates.

The ASR Outdoor Triple Riffle gold pan is the ideal gold prospectors mining tool to have with you in the field whether you're a seasoned miner 49'er or a newcomer to this exciting outdoor hobby. Search Terms: adult gold prospecting equipment gold panning mining pans backpacking camping metal detector nugget paydirt recovery sluice box accessories Features: - TRIPLE RIFFLE GOLD PAN: Gold pan incorporates deep and shallow riffle side wall and bottom, allowing better separation of gold from other heavy minerals - HIGH QUALITY FABRICATION: Molded from one piece high impact ABS plastic, this gold pan is lightweight, rust free, UV resistant and floats; Dimensions are 10 x 10 x 3 inches - MAXIMUM GOLD RECOVERY:Triple riffle gold pan design allows for all sizes of alluvial gold particles to be efficiently collected without missing any fine specs - PAY DIRT GOLD NUGGETS: Large riffles trap the gold much like the riffles in a sluice box, leading to a faster panning process letting you process more paydirt - BEFORE USE: Gold pan should be seasoned before use by washing off all factory production oils for best results === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 10 Inch Green Triple Riffle Gold Pan

anthropic.title_differentiation: Triple Riffle Design, High Impact ABS Plastic, UV Resistant, Rust Proof, Floats, Maximum Gold Recovery
